summary: Lead accepts M4 route and transport capacity planning forecasts after systems_architect ACCEPT, independent QA ACCEPT, and lead integration gates. The task adds a narrow read-only route-capacity forecast query over existing M2 route/season transport plus M4 grain and force commitments, with deterministic route/capacity/season reason tests and no march execution, battle/siege, UI, full economy, save-format, or naval expansion.

tests_run.result: Passed architecture boundaries, determinism, root Vitest 29 files / 192 tests, and web tests 1 file / 3 tests.
Passed format, lint, workspace typecheck, and architecture boundary checks.

tests_run.command: git diff scope scan with rg
tests_run.result: No forbidden path/scope, nondeterministic API, UI/platform import, save-format, naval/fleet, or explicit any matches in implementation diff.

decisions: Accepted after systems_architect and independent qa_reviewer verified the R3 route-capacity forecast implementation.
Kept implementation as read-only GameQuery with no command, event, persistent route planning object, or march execution state.
Package script change only adds the new route-capacity test file; no dependency changes.
risks: Future simultaneous convoy/shared-edge capacity reservation requires a separate task/ADR; current aggregate capacity is planning-only.
Polity-target route planning remains out of scope and is intentionally rejected until an explicit target-to-district policy is approved.
Save-format milestone work remains out of scope for this query-only task.
requested_action: Commit accepted implementation, create PR, require CI, merge to main, close task only after integration.
